name: The Back Nine Golf | Dayton, OH - Centerville
address: 101 E Alex Bell Rd #114, Centerville, OH 45459
about: The Back Nine Golf in Centerville, Ohio, offers a high-tech golf simulation experience with a full-service bar and lounge atmosphere. The venue features premium Trackman simulator technology suitable for both casual play and serious practice sessions. Pricing is structured per bay hour, making it accessible for individuals, groups, and corporate events looking for a relaxed yet sophisticated golfing environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Full bar and food service available on-site
Ideal for both casual play and serious practice sessions
Private and group bay options for various event types

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen with food service available
Full bar service with cocktails and beer

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual radar system for ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site. Club rentals are available for an additional fee.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, but the venue offers a full bar and kitchen with food options for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 1-2 hours per bay depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and offers youth programs, though some evening hours may have age restrictions.
